feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: How to Get a Delayed IT Project Back on Track

link.title: How to Get a Delayed IT Project Back on Track

entry.summary: On, off, and on-again IT projects can be frustrating. Here's how to get a renewed initiative back up to speed, efficiently and quickly.

entry.title: How to Implement Specific Distributed System Patterns Using Spring Boot

link.title: How to Implement Specific Distributed System Patterns Using Spring Boot

entry.summary: This article will focus on the specific recommendations for implementing various distributed system patterns regarding Spring Boot.

entry.title: The Rise of mobile payments apps in India

link.title: The Rise of mobile payments apps in India

entry.summary: The article surveys the crowded Indian mobile-payments landscape, contrasting mobile wallets and UPI apps, listing popular options, explaining their technology (UPI, NUUP, NFC, QR, etc.), and discussing security challenges and future growth prospects for a mobile-first digital economy.
